data.label: Jetpack Media Session
data.description: 媒体按钮接收器接收并帮助翻译硬件媒体播放按钮，例如在有线和无线耳机上找到的按钮，转化为应用中的相应回调。

data.label: Jetpack Media Session
data.description: A media button receiver receives and helps translate hardware media playback buttons, such as those found on wired and wireless headsets, into the appropriate callbacks in your app.
